Reentrancy in BimCoinToken.buy() (BimCoinToken.sol#441-465):
	External calls:
	- price = getPrice() (BimCoinToken.sol#447)
		- fiatService.USD(0) * buyPriceInCent (BimCoinToken.sol#473)
	External calls sending eth:
	- store.transfer(msg.value) (BimCoinToken.sol#459)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _transfer(owner,msg.sender,amount) (BimCoinToken.sol#463)
		- balanceOf[_from] -= _value (BimCoinToken.sol#379)
		- balanceOf[_to] += _value (BimCoinToken.sol#381)
